code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line() when Some(s) s when None "" end
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut p = 0
mut n = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(i) when Some(s) s when None "" end
  let v = match string.parse_int(tok) when Some(x) x when None 0 end
  if v > 0
    p = p + v
  else if v < 0
    n = n + v
  end
  i = i + 1
end
let r = p - n
print("r=#{r}")
